title: Arthur Lyon Bowley
body: Sir Arthur Lyon Bowley, FBA (6 November 1869 – 21 January 1957) was an English statistician and economist who worked on economic statistics and pioneered the use of sampling techniques in social surveys.
categories: Academics of the London School of Economics
